
# Reto 
### b00tl3gRSA2
## Descripcion
In RSA d is a lot bigger than e, why don't we use d to encrypt instead of e?Connect with nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 50976.
## Solucion
```
c = 

  

n = 

  

e = 

  
  

e = 65537

m = pow(c,e,n)

print(m)

  

flag = bytes.fromhex(hex(m)[2:]).decode()

  

print(flag)

picoCTF{bad_1d3a5_3801255}
```
